    <item>
        <guid>nba529649</guid>
        <title>Devin Booker: Drops team-high 23 points</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/devin-booker-3711</link>
        <description>Booker closed Sunday's 119-84 loss to Oklahoma City in Game 1 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs with 23 points (8-17 FG, 2-5 3Pt, 5-7 FT), six rebounds and two assists across 33 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 19 Apr 2026 5:00:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529645</guid>
        <title>Anthony Edwards: Questionable for Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/anthony-edwards-5110</link>
        <description>Edwards (knee) is listed as questionable for Monday's Game 2 of the Western Conference first-round playoff series against the Nuggets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 19 Apr 2026 4:05:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529643</guid>
        <title>OG Anunoby: Probable for Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/og-anunoby-4121</link>
        <description>Anunoby (ankle) is listed as probable for Monday's Game 2 of the Eastern Conference first-round playoff series against the Hawks.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 19 Apr 2026 2:16:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529642</guid>
        <title>Jordan Goodwin: Won't return Sunday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jordan-goodwin-5460</link>
        <description>Goodwin has been ruled out for the rest of Game 1 of the Western Conference first-round playoff series against the Thunder on Sunday due to left calf soreness, Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 19 Apr 2026 2:15:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529641</guid>
        <title>Onyeka Okongwu: Questionable for Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/onyeka-okongwu-5118</link>
        <description>Okongwu is questionable for Monday's Game 2 of the Eastern Conference first-round playoff series against the Knicks due to right knee inflammation.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 19 Apr 2026 2:12:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
